daemon._comment: Fixed 5min cron. Agent can call daemon manually at boot.

boot._calibration_note: Initial values. Calibrate from mindstate-boot.log after 2-4 weeks.

semantic_predictions._comment: Set to true if cheap inference available. Works without.

execution_gate._comment: Gate blocks new proposals until pending actions resolved. 600s = 10min max per action before auto-defer.

watchdog._comment: By default: detect + log only. Set allow_kill=true to let watchdog terminate hung mindstate-*.sh processes. Set allow_cleanup=true to let it delete orphaned .tmp files. Auto-freeze is safe (just runs freeze.sh) and enabled by default.

wake_gate._comment: Phase 2: wakes agent via system event. Enable after testing gate in heartbeat-only mode.
